summary: Iteration 33 - Auto Expiry Reminder System Testing Complete. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working. Backend APIs for check-expiry-reminders (with deduplication) and expiry-summary (with role-based scoping) working correctly. Admin Dashboard shows Document Expiry Tracker widget with color-coded cards (Expired/Critical/Attention) and 'Auto-reminders active' text. Client Dashboard shows Document Expiry Alerts card with urgent badge and auto-triggers check-expiry-reminders on load. Case Manager Dashboard shows Expiry Alerts sidebar nav with red badge count, summary cards, and full expiring documents table with Edit buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: Auto Expiry Reminder System is well-implemented with proper deduplication using reminder_key field
Notifications are sent to both client_id and case_manager_id from the case as designed
Dedup key format correctly uses: expiry_{doc_id}_{level} for client, expiry_{doc_id}_{level}_cm for case manager
Admin gets summary for ALL cases, Case Manager gets summary only for their assigned cases - role-based scoping working
Fire-and-forget pattern correctly implemented on dashboard load for all roles
seed_data_creation: Test documents with various expiry dates already exist from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 tested Auto Expiry Reminder System. ALL PASSED: (1) POST /api/documents/check-expiry-reminders - Creates in-app notifications for expiring documents at thresholds: 60d (attention), 30d (warning), 7d (critical), 0d (expired), (2) Deduplication working - running twice on same day sends fewer reminders second time using reminder_key field, (3) GET /api/documents/expiry-summary - Returns counts: expired, critical, warning, attention, ok, total, (4) Admin gets summary for ALL cases, Case Manager gets summary only for their assigned cases, (5) Client correctly forbidden from expiry-summary (403), (6) Admin Dashboard - Document Expiry Tracker widget shows Expired/Critical/Attention counts with color-coded cards and 'Auto-reminders active' text, (7) Client Dashboard - Auto-triggers check-expiry-reminders on load (fire and forget), shows Document Expiry Alerts card with urgent badge, (8) Case Manager Dashboard - Auto-triggers check-expiry-reminders on load, Expiry Alerts sidebar nav with red badge count showing urgent docs, summary cards (Expired/Critical/Warning/Attention), full expiring documents table with Edit buttons. Email service is MOCKED - using in-app notifications only.

backend_apis.health_endpoint: PASS - Returns healthy with database connected
backend_apis.check_expiry_reminders_admin: PASS - Admin can trigger expiry check
backend_apis.check_expiry_reminders_manager: PASS - Case Manager can trigger expiry check
backend_apis.check_expiry_reminders_client: PASS - Client can trigger expiry check
backend_apis.check_expiry_reminders_deduplication: PASS - Running twice sends fewer reminders (deduplication working)
backend_apis.expiry_summary_admin: PASS - Admin gets summary for ALL cases with correct counts
backend_apis.expiry_summary_manager: PASS - Case Manager gets summary only for assigned cases
backend_apis.expiry_summary_scope_verification: PASS - Admin total >= Manager total (scope working)
backend_apis.urgency_levels_calculation: PASS - Urgency levels correctly assigned based on days remaining
backend_apis.manager_notifications: PASS - Case Manager receives expiry notifications
backend_apis.dashboard_data_loads: PASS - Admin Dashboard expiry summary loads correctly

admin_dashboard.expired_count_card: PASS - Shows 1 Expired with red styling
admin_dashboard.critical_count_card: PASS - Shows 1 Critical (<30d) with orange styling
admin_dashboard.attention_count_card: PASS - Shows 1 Attention (<90d) with yellow styling
admin_dashboard.auto_reminders_text: PASS - Shows 'Total tracked: 9 documents | Auto-reminders active'

client_dashboard.expiry_rows: PASS - Shows documents with expiry info (Expired 46 days ago, Expires in 14 days!, Expires in 67 days)
client_dashboard.update_buttons: PASS - Each document has Update button
client_dashboard.auto_trigger_on_load: PASS - check-expiry-reminders called on dashboard load

case_manager_dashboard.summary_cards: PASS - Shows Expired (1), Critical (1), Warning (0), Attention (1)
case_manager_dashboard.expiring_documents_table: PASS - Shows 'All Expiring Documents (9)' with Document, Client, Case, Expiry Date, Status, Action columns
case_manager_dashboard.status_badges: PASS - Color-coded badges: 'Expired 46d ago', '14 days left', '67 days left', etc.
case_manager_dashboard.edit_buttons: PASS - Each document has Edit button
case_manager_dashboard.auto_trigger_on_load: PASS - check-expiry-reminders called on dashboard load

mocked_services.email_service: MOCKED - In-app notifications only, no real email sent
